Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Iron Ore Delivery #001 – Sishen to Saldanha Bay, 12,400 MT
Description: Tokenised freight rail delivery record for 12,400 MT iron ore (Fe 64.5%, moisture 7.8%) transported on Transnet's dedicated Sishen-Saldanha (SiSa) iron ore export line from Sishen Mine (Northern Cape) to Saldanha Bay Port. Train manifest TFR-SiSa-2025-0312. Kumba Iron Ore export permit attached.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Chrome Ore Delivery #002 – Rustenburg to Maputo Port, 3,800 MT
Description: 3,800 MT metallurgical-grade chrome ore (42% Cr₂O₃) from Pilbara Minerals Rustenburg concentrator transported via TFR coal-link line to Maputo Port, Mozambique. Train manifest TFR-MBT-2025-0178. Chrome ore export declaration ED-SARS-2025-0178 and Ferrochrome supply chain traceability certificate.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Manganese Ore Delivery #003 – Hotazel to Port Elizabeth, 5,200 MT
Description: 5,200 MT manganese ore (46% Mn) from South32 Hotazel (Northern Cape) transported via TFR Manganese rail line to Port Elizabeth (Gqeberha) manganese export terminal. Train manifest TFR-MGN-2025-0234. South32 export permit and SAMSA weight/moisture certificate.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Coal Delivery #004 – Witbank to Richards Bay Coal Terminal, 8,600 MT
Description: 8,600 MT thermal coal (CV 5,500 kcal/kg) from Glencore Tweefontein Mine (eMalahleni) transported via TFR coal-link to Richards Bay Coal Terminal (RBCT). Train manifest TFR-RBCT-2025-0289. RBCT loading certificate and Glencore export permit attached. FICA compliance confirmed.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Maize Delivery #005 – Free State to Durban Export, 4,200 MT
Description: 4,200 MT yellow maize (Grade 1, 12.5% moisture) from SILO free-state aggregators transported via TFR General Freight to Durban Maydon Wharf grain terminal for export to Kenya. SAGIS lot SA-MZ-2025-0178. Phytosanitary certificate DALRRD-PHY-2025-0178.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Automotive Components Delivery #006 – Pretoria to Durban Port, 780 MT
Description: 780 MT automotive components (CKD kits for Toyota Quantum and Hilux) from Toyota SA manufacturing plant Prospecton Pretoria destined for export via Durban Port. Train manifest TFR-AUT-2025-0345. Toyota SA export permit and SABS homologation certificates.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Platinum Concentrate Delivery #007 – Rustenburg to Cape Town, 420 MT
Description: 420 MT platinum-palladium concentrate (4E grade) from Impala Platinum Rustenburg smelter delivered via TFR freight rail to Cape Town Waterfront logistics hub for refining and export. Train manifest TFR-PGM-2025-0389. DMRE export permit and Assay certificate attached.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Steel Products Delivery #008 – Vanderbijlpark to Durban, 1,800 MT
Description: 1,800 MT rolled steel products (hot-rolled coil, I-beams, rebar) from ArcelorMittal Vanderbijlpark works delivered via TFR to Durban Pier 1 for export to SADC region. Manifest TFR-STL-2025-0412. SABS SANS 1083/10/1408 compliance certificates and mill certificates attached.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Fertiliser Delivery #009 – Durban Port to Johannesburg Agri Hub, 2,400 MT
Description: 2,400 MT imported granular fertiliser (LAN 28% N + MAP + KCl) from Durban Maydon Wharf fertiliser terminal to Johannesburg Agri Hub distribution point via TFR General Freight. Manifest TFR-FRT-2025-0445. Fertiliser Act registration certificate FA-2025-0223.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Containerised Citrus Delivery #010 – Citrusdal to Cape Town Port, 620 MT
Description: 620 MT citrus fruit (Navel oranges, lemons, grapefruit) from Citrusdal co-op in reefer containers via TFR to Cape Town Port for export to EU (Netherlands, UK). PPECB phytosanitary certificate PPECB-PHY-2025-0178. Coolstore temperature log hash attached. GlobalG.A.P. certified.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–MZ Ressano Garcia – Coal Export
Description: Cross-border trade certificate for 2,800 MT thermal coal exported from South Africa to Mozambique via Ressano Garcia/Lebombo rail border post. SARS export declaration ED-2025-0678. Mozambique Customs import permit MAP-2025-0345. SADC certificate of origin CO-ZA-2025-0678.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–ZW Beit Bridge – Maize Import
Description: SADC cross-border trade certificate for 800 MT yellow maize imported from Zimbabwe via Beit Bridge rail crossing to South Africa. SARS import declaration ID-2025-0789. Zimbabwe Grain Marketing Board export permit ZGM-2025-0234. DALRRD phytosanitary inspection PHY-2025-0267.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–ZM Chirundu – Steel Export
Description: SADC cross-border certificate for 340 MT structural steel sections exported from Vanderbijlpark to Zambia via Chirundu rail link. SARS export declaration ED-2025-0845. Zambia Revenue Authority import permit ZRA-IMP-2025-0234. SADC rules of origin certificate CO-ZA-2025-0845.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–BW Ramatlabama – Grain Export
Description: SADC CoO and cross-border certificate for 1,400 MT white maize exported from Free State to Botswana via Ramatlabama rail border. Botswana Agricultural Marketing Board import permit BAMB-2025-0156. DALRRD phytosanitary PHY-2025-0189. SADC certificate CO-ZA-2025-0901.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–MOZ Golela – Sugar Export
Description: SADC CoO for 2,200 MT refined white sugar (ICUMSA 45) exported from Swaziland Sugar Association via TFR to Mozambique through Golela/Lavumisa rail border. SARS export declaration ED-2025-0967. Mozambique Customs MZP-2025-0456. COMESA preferential tariff.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–NA Upington to Windhoek – Mining Supplies
Description: SADC cross-border certificate for mining consumables (drill steel, explosives, ball mill liners) exported to Namibia via Upington–Ariamsvlei rail link. SARS export declaration ED-2025-1012. Namibia MET import permit NMT-2025-0089. Explosives transport permit SAPS-EXP-2025-0234.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–MZ Komatipoort – Chrome Export
Description: SADC CoO for 1,600 MT ferrochrome (FeCr 52% Cr) exported to Mozambique through Komatipoort/Ressano Garcia for transhipment to China. SARS ED-2025-1089. Mozambique Customs MZP-2025-0512. DMR export permit DMR-CHR-2025-0189.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cross-Border Certificate – ZA–SZ Golela – Citrus Export to Eswatini
Description: SADC cross-border certificate for 240 MT mixed citrus (oranges, lemons) from Natal Citrus Producers co-op exported to Eswatini via Golela rail crossing. PPECB phytosanitary PHY-2025-0378. SARS ED-2025-1145. Eswatini Ministry of Agriculture import permit.

Name: SARS Customs Clearance – Durban Port – Iron Ore Export – Entry No. SARS-DBN-2025-4201
Description: SARS customs export clearance at Durban Port for 3,200 MT iron ore (Fe 62%, moisture 8.5%) from Sishen Mine for export to China via bulk carrier MV Fortune. Entry No. SARS-DBN-2025-4201. DMRE export permit DMR-IO-2025-0201 and SAMSA weigh-bridge certificate attached.

Name: SARS Customs Clearance – Richards Bay – Coal Export – Entry No. SARS-RBY-2025-5678
Description: SARS export customs clearance at Richards Bay Coal Terminal (RBCT) for 8,600 MT thermal coal (Glencore Tweefontein, CV 5,500 kcal/kg). Entry No. SARS-RBY-2025-5678. RBCT loading certificate, vessel nomination and export levy payment receipt attached.

Name: SARS Customs Clearance – Cape Town Port – Citrus Export – Entry No. SARS-CPT-2025-3412
Description: SARS export customs clearance at Cape Town Port for 620 MT citrus (oranges, lemons) in reefer containers from Citrusdal co-op bound for Netherlands. Entry No. SARS-CPT-2025-3412. PPECB phytosanitary PHY-2025-0178 and GlobalG.A.P. number 00025-GHPSI-0012 attached.

Name: SARS Customs Clearance – Gqeberha Port – Manganese Export – Entry No. SARS-PE-2025-6789
Description: SARS export customs clearance at Port of Gqeberha (Port Elizabeth) for 5,200 MT manganese ore (South32 Hotazel, 46% Mn) destined for China via bulk carrier MV Harmony. Entry No. SARS-PE-2025-6789. DMRE export permit DMR-MN-2025-0345 and Hotazel mine weight certificate.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cold Chain – Reefer Train – Citrus Mpumalanga to Durban – 480 MT, 4–6°C
Description: Cold chain event for 480 MT Navel oranges (Loskop Valley, Mpumalanga) transported in TFR reefer rail wagons from Marble Hall to Durban Port Pier 1 for UK export. Temperature maintained 4–6°C throughout 720 km rail journey. IoT logger TRF-CCH-2025-0112 continuous log hash verified.

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cold Chain – Reefer Container – Table Grapes to Cape Town Port – 120 MT, 0–1°C
Description: Cold chain event for 120 MT table grapes (Crimson Seedless, Sweet Globe) from Hex River Valley in TFR reefer containers to Cape Town Port. Temperature maintained 0–1°C under modified atmosphere. PPECB reefer inspection certificate PHY-2025-0267. SO₂ treatment pads verified. Destination: Europe (Netherlands, Germany).

Name: Transnet Freight Rail – Cold Chain – Reefer Wagon – Avocado Limpopo to Durban – 95 MT, 5–7°C
Description: Cold chain event: 95 MT Hass avocado (stage 1–2, ≥200g) from Tzaneen Limpopo in reefer wagons to Durban Port for export to UK (Tesco). Temperature 5–7°C maintained throughout 900 km TFR rail journey. PPECB phytosanitary certificate and GlobalG.A.P. record GP-ZA-2025-0345 attached.
